calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Designating Real Property To Be An Asset Of The Revocable Living Trust Agreement Of J.D. Henry
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Greer Smith appearing for and with successor trustee Larry Gibson. Sandra Brown-Henry is in court. All the beneficiaries under the 1997 trust are in court. Court is satisfied with notice. Issues addressed. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

Petition For Order Designating Real Property To Be An Asset Of The Revocable Living Trust Agreement Of J.D. Henry
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Continued To May-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Designating Real Property To Be An Asset Of The Revocable Living Trust Agreement Of J.D. Henry
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Continued To May-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith (Counsel for Larry Gibson and Sandra Brown-Henry, Petitioners); Larry Gibson (Petitioner, present in court); Sandra Brown-Henry (Petitioner, present in court); Nashawn Brown (Interested Person, present in court); Albert Lucas (Interested Person, present in court).

After extensive discussion concerning the possible effects of the Petition (including the removal of all corpus from one trust) and the possibly want of the clarity of that result in the Notice and the Petition, the Court continued the hearing on this matter to May 1, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. In that time, Ms. Smith is to send a new Notice which more clearly evidences the consequences of the Petition and is to amend the Petition to the same end.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
